recommendations.title: Home

recommendations.title: Passage of Venus
recommendations.overview: Photo sequence of the rare transit of Venus over the face of the Sun, one of the first chronophotographic sequences.  In 1873, P.J.C. Janssen, or Pierre Jules César Janssen, invented the Photographic Revolver, which captured a series of images in a r
recommendations.director: P.J.C. Janssen, Francisco Antônio de Almeida Júnior

recommendations.title: The Man Who Loved Women
recommendations.overview: At Bertrand Morane's burial there are many of the women that the 40-year-old engineer loved. In flashback Bertrand's life and love affairs are told by himself while writing an autobiographical novel.

recommendations.title: A Dog's Journey
recommendations.overview: A dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he meets.

recommendations.title: To the Bone
recommendations.overview: A young woman dealing with anorexia meets an unconventional doctor who challenges her to face her condition and embrace life.

recommendations.title: Folklore: The Long Pond Studio Sessions
recommendations.overview: An intimate concert film, in which Taylor Swift performs each song from her album 'folklore' in order, as she reveals the meaning and the stories behind all 17 tracks for the very first time.

recommendations.title: The Best Offer
recommendations.overview: Virgil Oldman is a world renowned antiques expert and auctioneer. An eccentric genius, he leads a solitary life, going to extreme lengths to keep his distance from the messiness of human relationships. When appointed by the beautiful but emotionally

recommendations.title: The Secret
recommendations.overview: Interviews with leading authors, philosophers and scientists, with an in-depth discussion of the Law of Attraction. The audience is shown how they can learn and use 'The Secret' in their everyday lives.

recommendations.title: Koyaanisqatsi
recommendations.overview: Takes us to locations all around the US and shows us the heavy toll that modern technology is having on humans and the earth. The visual tone poem contains neither dialogue nor a vocalized narration: its tone is set by the juxtaposition of images and

recommendations.title: Finding Vivian Maier
